properties.description: Data Flow to pull data from ADLS Stg to ADLS Raw.

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(output(
		ECI_ID as string,
		PROJ_NB as string,
		R_CODE as string,
		R_SUPP as string,
		ACTUAL_IND as string,
		ORDER_SEQ as string,
		SHORT_DESC as string,
		SCHEDULED_DATE as string,
		PLANNED_DATE as string,
		ACTUAL_DATE as string,
		ECI_COMMENT as string,
		ECI_ATTR_4 as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		DEPARTMENT as string,
		PLANNED_BUYER as string,
		REQ_DESC as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'Filename',
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath + $FileName + '.csv')]) ~> srcSMATRPSRReportStage
srcSMATRPSRReportStage derive(Filename = concat($WildPath,substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$FileName,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'Filename',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		ECI_ID,
		PROJ_NB,
		R_CODE,
		R_SUPP,
		ACTUAL_IND,
		ORDER_SEQ,
		SHORT_DESC,
		SCHEDULED_DATE,
		PLANNED_DATE,
		ACTUAL_DATE,
		ECI_COMMENT,
		ECI_ATTR_4,
		DISCIPLINE,
		DEPARTMENT,
		PLANNED_BUYER,
		REQ_DESC,
		Filename
	)) ~> snkSMATRPSRRaw
